name: Vessel Scout Case
summary: Vessel Scout Case — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Vessel Scout Case is a compact, impact-resistant carry case built to keep the Vessel Compass and its accessories protected, organised, and travel-ready. Designed for everyday use, the Scout pairs a rugged moulded core with a refined exterior finish, offering discreet and durable protection for your customers. The Scout Case is engineered to fit one Vessel Compass battery and two cartridges, with additional space for essentials such as a USB-C charger, stems, or other small accessories. Slide your Compass battery into the elastic holder and place up to two cartridges in their designated slots. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Moulded EVA core with premium protective exterior
